items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conditional questions based on responses.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'conditional questions based on responses'. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly demonstrate how conditional questions are implemented or triggered based on user responses. The linked use case mentions follow-up questions based on ratings, but it lacks detailed evidence of the conditional logic that would confirm the requirement is satisfied.
